columns.name: coreItems
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<itemIds: STRING COMMENT '1st_3_items', games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: itemsAfterCore
columns.typeText: MAP<STRING, MAP<INT, ARRAY<STRUCT<itemIds: ARRAY<INT>, games: BIGINT, wins: BIGINT>>>>

columns.name: situationalItems
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<itemId: INT, games: BIGINT, wins: BIGINT, pick_rate: DOUBLE, averageIndex: DOUBLE, distinctive_score: DOUBLE, support_avg_pick_rate: DOUBLE, pick_rate_w_support_difference: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: startingItems
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<itemIds: ARRAY<STRING>, games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: runes
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<runeId: INT, treeId: INT, index: INT, games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: shards
columns.typeText: STRUCT<defenseShard: ARRAY<STRUCT<shard_id: STRING COMMENT 'shard_defense_id', games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>, flexShard: ARRAY<STRUCT<shard_id: STRING COMMENT 'shard_flex_id', games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>, offenseShard: ARRAY<STRUCT<shard_id: STRING COMMENT 'shard_offense_id', games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>>

columns.name: summonerSpells
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<summonerSpellIds: ARRAY<INT>, games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: skillOrders
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<skillOrder: ARRAY<INT>, games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: itemOrders
columns.typeText: MAP<BIGINT, ARRAY<STRUCT<pick_rate_rank: INT, items_order: ARRAY<BIGINT>, games: BIGINT, wins: BIGINT, pick_rate: DOUBLE>>>

columns.name: keystone
columns.typeText: ARRAY<STRUCT<keystone_id: INT, treeId: INT, games: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of games with this champion', wins: BIGINT COMMENT 'agg column, number of won games with this champion', pick_rate: DOUBLE>>

columns.name: previous_patch_stats
columns.typeText: STRUCT<patch: STRING, games: BIGINT, wins: BIGINT, win_rate: DOUBLE, adjusted_win_rate: DOUBLE, pick_rate: DOUBLE, win_rate_delta: DOUBLE, adjusted_win_rate_delta: DOUBLE, pick_rate_delta: DOUBLE, champion_win_rate: DOUBLE, build_champion_win_rate_diff: DOUBLE, build_champion_win_rate_diff_delta: DOUBLE>

columns.name: num_items_stats
columns.typeText: STRUCT<num_items_gte_3_num_games: BIGINT, p_num_items_gte_3: DOUBLE, num_items_lt_3_wr: DOUBLE>
